driver_subject: iio: multiplexer: Make use of device properties
kernel_subject: device: property: add helpers to count items in string arrays
stage1_reason: Driver replaces OF-specific API calls (of_property_for_each_string, of_property_read_u32) with generic property API calls (device_property_*), removing OF dependency and enabling non-OF platforms.
stage2_reason: Driver commit replaces OF-specific functions (of_property_for_each_string, of_property_read_u32) with generic device_property_* APIs introduced in kernel commit 6b6ff4acb310, which added device_property_string_array_count and device_property_read_string_array helpers.
